name: Pistachio Swirl Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cream cheese in a small glass bowl with an electric mixer, or in a 1-quart microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on high for 15 to 25 seconds until softened.
2. Add 2 tablespoons of the sweetened condensed milk and vanilla. Beat on low speed just until smooth; set aside.
3. In a 2 1/2 quart microwave-safe bowl, combine remaining sweetened condensed milk, semisweet chocolate, and butter. Microwave on medium for 2 to 3 minutes until smooth and glossy, stirring twice.
4. Stir in the pistachios.
5. Spread the chocolate mixture evenly into a prepared pan.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the cream cheese mixture over the chocolate, swirling lightly.
7. Let firm or refrigerate; cut into 25 even squares by making 4 lengthwise and 4 crosswise cuts equidistant from each other, then cut each square diagonally in half.
8. Store in an airtight container with waxed paper between layers. Makes 50.
